mapper.select: select t.*,u.nick_name create_name from news t left join sys_user u on t.create_by = u.user_id ${ew.customSqlSegment}
select t.* from news t where t.id < #{id} and type = #{type} order by t.id desc limit 1
select t.* from news t where t.id > #{id} and type = #{type} order by t.id limit 1
